data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Priority booking (members book before public)', but the evidence provided does not confirm this functionality. While the linked use case mentions that members get a 7-day advance booking compared to 3 days for non-members, there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this requirement is satisfied. This leads to a gap in the validation of the requirement as there is insufficient evidence to confirm the priority booking feature.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of priority booking for members.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the priority booking requirement.
